subflows.title: Appointment booking form
subflows.description: Custom-code multi-step booking request for clinics, salons, consultants, and service businesses.

subflows.description: Custom-code product bug report flow with platform, summary, repro steps, and expected result.

subflows.description: Custom-code callback request flow with name, phone, preferred time, and note.

subflows.title: Complaint form
subflows.description: Custom-code complaint intake with topic, details, and optional reference.

subflows.title: Consultation request form
subflows.description: Custom-code consultation request flow with topic, format, and contact number.

subflows.description: Simple confirmation prompt with direct yes/no outputs.

subflows.title: Delivery request form
subflows.description: Custom-code delivery request flow with address, time, and contact details.

subflows.title: Demo request form
subflows.description: Custom-code product demo request form for B2B and SaaS use cases.

subflows.title: Event registration form
subflows.description: Custom-code event registration with guest count, phone, and note.

subflows.title: Feedback form
subflows.description: Collects rating and free-text feedback, then exits as completed or cancelled.

subflows.title: Job application form
subflows.description: Custom-code multi-step vacancy application with role, experience, phone, and portfolio/CV.

subflows.title: Lead capture
subflows.description: Collects name and phone, confirms, then exits as completed or cancelled.

subflows.title: Maintenance request form
subflows.description: Custom-code maintenance/service request for equipment, facilities, or field service teams.

subflows.title: Multi-step register form
subflows.description: Custom-code multi-step registration form for courses, events, memberships, and service onboarding.

subflows.description: Custom-code subscriber signup flow with topics of interest.

subflows.title: Order request form
subflows.description: Custom-code order request flow with product, quantity, address, and phone.

subflows.title: Partner application form
subflows.description: Custom-code partnership application for agencies, resellers, and media partners.

subflows.title: Phone capture
subflows.description: Collects a phone number and exits as completed or cancelled.

subflows.title: Promo claim form
subflows.description: Custom-code promo claim flow with promo code and contact capture.

subflows.description: Custom-code multi-step commercial request form with need, budget, timeline, and contact info.

subflows.title: Reservation request form
subflows.description: Custom-code reservation flow for tables, seats, showrooms, and visits.

subflows.title: Supplier request form
subflows.description: Custom-code supplier onboarding/request flow with category, offer, and phone.

subflows.title: Quick survey form
subflows.description: Custom-code short survey flow with three open-ended questions.

subflows.description: Collects a generic text input, confirms receipt, then exits as completed or cancelled.

subflows.description: Requests a Telegram contact share, captures the phone number, then exits as completed.
